name: Blindé
description: Mur humain recouvert de plaques de station spatiale rivetées. Lent, bruyant, indestructible. Les balles ricochent sur lui comme la pluie sur une carrosserie.
prompt: Sci-fi scrap-punk ultra-heavy infantry tank, massive human silhouette completely encased in layered hull plates and riveted station panels, visor barely visible, immovable stance, duct tape seams, industrial sparks, grimy dark background, cinematic, highly detailed
